vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing

parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each
Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance
EPP foam core + CFRP spar, process: FDM + foam

verify.rule: All fields in the blueprint schema are present and correctly filled.
The estimated mass does not exceed the allocated budget.
Each requirement from the P0 document is mapped to a specific geometric feature.
Interfaces between subsystems are reciprocal and consistent.
Critical joints specify locking methods and preload/torque values.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface geometries.
risk.mit: Implement detailed alignment guides and perform pre-assembly checks.

risk.desc: Insufficient cooling airflow may cause overheating of the motor pod.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the cooling inlet or add additional cooling channels.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at the wing spar attachment point under extreme loads.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and reinforce the attachment area if necessary.

risk.desc: Difficulty in accessing certain areas for maintenance due to tight spaces.
risk.mit: Design larger access cutouts or modular sections for easier servicing.

risk.desc: Inconsistent tolerances between different manufacturing processes.
risk.mit: Standardize tolerances and conduct regular process audits.

physics_paths.description: Heat transfer from motor pod to cooling inlet
Structural loads from wing structure transferred to center body pod
Human access through equipment bay door to equipment bay

Cable entry port designed for strain relief
